creator: freebsd-maintainer@opera.com
text:
I haven't seen reports of this before, and it doesn't sound like something  
that would be specific to Opera on FreeBSD. Can you provide clearer  
reproduction steps?

If the problem persists, you should probably file it in Opera's bug  
database ( see https://bugs.opera.com/wizard/ ), since it's unlikely that  
the FreeBSD folks (or the port maintainer, for that matter) can do  
anything about it.

Arjan

-- 
Using Opera's revolutionary e-mail client: http://www.opera.com/mail/
